nodes.label: Diffie-Hellman group mapping: MikroTik vs Juniper SSG
Diffie-Hellman group naming (Group N vs modpXXXX/ecpXXX)
nodes.rationale: Juniper SSG/ScreenOS names DH groups by number (Group 14) while MikroTik RouterOS uses MODP/ECP key-size names (modp2048); the naming mismatch makes it easy to pick different DH groups on the two VPN ends, breaking IKE negotiation. Phase 1 (profile dh-group) and Phase 2 PFS (proposal pfs-group) are configured separately and must both match.
